findings.message: PostToolUse hook concatenates tool_input.file_path directly into an execSync shell command string; a crafted filename with shell metacharacters can execute arbitrary commands
Notification hook concatenates d.message into osascript/notify-send/PowerShell command strings without sanitization; crafted message content can inject shell commands
No model field declared in frontmatter; consumers cannot determine intended model tier
Zero example invocation blocks; no input/output pair shows how the skill behaves when triggered
Skill instructs Claude to read AGENTS.md, write agent_docs files, and run npm/git Bash commands but declares no allowed-tools in frontmatter
No model field declared in frontmatter; consumers cannot determine intended model tier
Only one example block present (Good/Avoid communication style); does not demonstrate full skill invocation with input and structured output
Vague quantifiers: 'relevant' (line 29), 'brief' (line 41), 'minimal' (line 63) give no measurable criteria for what qualifies
No model field declared in frontmatter; consumers cannot determine intended model tier
Zero example invocation blocks; no input/output pair shows how the skill behaves when triggered
